name: Chili Crab Puff: Ladies Lunch
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Marinara Sauce or tomato sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Grease a deep 12- to 2-quart baking dish and set aside.
3. Set aside 2 cups of the cheese for the top.
4. Place one-third of the cheese on the bottom of the baking dish.
5. Add one-third of the crab meat and one-third of the diced green chilies to the dish.
6. Repeat these layers twice more, finishing with the chili and crab in the top layer.
7. Whisk together the half-and-half, eggs, and flour until well combined.
8. Pour this mixture evenly over the layers in the baking dish.
9. Spread the marinara sauce evenly over the top of the cheese layer.
10. Sprinkle the reserved cheese on top of the sauce.
11. Bake, uncovered, for 1 hour, or until hot and set in the center.
Yield: 4 servings
